name: Lumière Radiance Serum
description: A weightless vitamin-C and peptide serum that evens tone and lifts dullness over four weeks of use. The serum we reach for in every facial.

name: Soft Clay Cleansing Balm
description: A melting balm-to-milk cleanser with kaolin and camellia oil. Dissolves the day without stripping the barrier.

name: Rosewater Veil Mist
description: A fine hydrating mist of triple-distilled rosewater and panthenol. A reset between meetings.

name: Overnight Barrier Mask
description: A rich ceramide sleeping mask that repairs while you rest. Wake to calm, cushioned skin.

name: Gloss Finishing Hair Oil
description: A dry-touch oil that tames flyaways and adds salon shine without weight. Used to finish every blow-dry.

name: Bond Repair Shampoo
description: A gentle, colour-safe cleanser that strengthens lifted and coloured hair wash after wash.

name: Contour Body Oil
description: A fast-absorbing oil of squalane and grapefruit used in our sculpt massage. For skin that feels cared for.

name: Jade Contour Stone
description: A hand-finished jade tool for at-home lymphatic massage. The ritual that extends your facial.
